name: jarvis-command-center
description: J.A.R.V.I.S. Command Center — full-stack HUD frontend + BFF that integrates NousResearch hermes-agent (deployed on a Hostinger VPS) with a Postgres store for app-owned domains.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=@jarvis/bff & npm run dev --workspace=@jarvis/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@jarvis/shared && npm run build --workspace=@jarvis/bff && npm run build --workspace=@jarvis/web
